title: Make primary key the board uneditable field
excerpt: instead of having a text field be the uneditable column field on a board, make it possible to use a unique primary key instead. this way when using boards for app development bug lists (for example), items can be organiz…

posts.author: Elent (Elena)
posts.cookedHtml: instead of having a text field be the uneditable column field on a board, make it possible to use a unique primary key instead. this way when using boards for app development bug lists (for example), items can be organized by a unique number, as opposed to a long line of text
